name: Digital Supply Chain
initializeCommand: if ! docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1 && ! command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl && mkdir -p /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins && curl -L https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/v2.22.0/docker-compose-linux-x86_64 -o /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose && chmod +x /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose && ln -sf /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose /usr/local/bin/docker-compose; fi
